extra.message: The SQL query is built by concatenating post_id directly into the statement passed to conn.execute(). The preceding multiline regex check is not a safe SQL boundary and can be bypassed if attacker-controlled input reaches this code.

The server appends self.path to the current working directory and opens the resulting path. The weak regex only blocks one specific traversal pattern, allowing crafted paths such as /../ to read files outside the intended directory.

cwe: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

extra.message: User-controlled request.args['url'] is passed to urllib.request.urlopen() after only a startswith() check. URLs such as https://insecurewebapp.com@127.0.0.1/ pass the check but target an internal host, enabling SSRF.
The username value derived from the session_id cookie is written directly into an HTML response without escaping. A crafted username value can inject script into the rendered page.

cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

extra.message: The payment signature is computed as SHA-256(secret || payment_information) instead of using HMAC. This construction is vulnerable to length-extension attacks that can allow payment parameters to be tampered with while preserving a valid signature.

cwe: CWE-347: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature

extra.message: The payment signature is computed as SHA-256(secret || payment_information) instead of using HMAC. This construction is vulnerable to length-extension attacks that can allow payment parameters to be tampered with while preserving a valid signature.

cwe: CWE-347: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature

extra.message: TLS hostname verification is explicitly disabled with context.check_hostname = False. This allows certificates for other hosts to be accepted and enables man-in-the-middle attacks.
The Flask SECRET_KEY is hardcoded in source. Anyone with source access can forge or tamper with Flask signed session data that relies on this key.
